name: Create Algorithm Flowchart Lesson
description: As a 6th-grade Computer Science teacher, create a 2-page ActivInspire flipchart to introduce algorithms and flowcharts. Page 1, titled 'Flowchart Symbols', must contain a key with an Oval labeled 'Start / End', a Rectangle labeled 'Process', and a Diamond labeled 'Decision'. Page 2, titled 'Morning Routine Algorithm', must feature a flowchart starting with an Oval 'Start' node, followed by an 'Alarm Rings' Rectangle, leading to an 'Is it a weekday?' Diamond decision with 'Yes' ('Get Up') and 'No' ('Sleep In') branches connected in a logical flow. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/algorithm_flowchart.flipchart.
